content: I'm trying to port some features from the rust branch to the rust-next branch. git cherrypick seems the right way to do it but which are the commits related to device drivers like adding the FileOperations and the miscdev crate?
you can try to find them using git blame, but if you are only experimenting, you can also just copy the files.
I already tried that? Is there a special way the bindgen handles porting to rust or just the normal behaviour of bindgen
I am not an expert on bindgen, but you can look at how we use bindgen in our makefiles (though they are rather complex), so maybe someone else knows more
